expectations.text: Looks for relevant patterns in the codebase or skill instructions instead of inventing the design in isolation.
expectations.evidence: Relevant Findings cites feature-dev workflow instructions and handoff template as grounding sources, rather than freehand design only.

expectations.text: Creates a concrete file-backed handoff artifact at a path matching the workflow's handoff contract.
expectations.evidence: Response reports artifact creation at /home/adam/.agents/.agents/scratchpad/config-validation-module/handoff-plan.md (matching .agents/scratchpad/<feature-name>/handoff-plan.md), and that path exists; a copy is present in outputs/handoff-plan.md.

expectations.text: The artifact content follows a reusable template shape and includes implementation slices, file-level map, and validation plan.
expectations.evidence: Artifact includes ordered implementation slices, 'File-by-File Implementation Map', and a dedicated 'Validation Plan' section with reusable template structure.

expectations.text: Artifact metadata fields are concretely filled (no placeholder bracket values) for status, track, and next step.
expectations.evidence: Artifact metadata concretely sets Status, Track, and Next Step with no placeholder bracket tokens.

expectations.text: Each referenced file in Relevant Findings includes why that file matters.
expectations.evidence: Each listed finding includes an explicit 'Why it matters' rationale in both response and artifact.

expectations.text: Open questions are tightly bounded to truly blocking items and include risk framing.
expectations.evidence: Open Questions are limited to three blocking contract details and each includes risk impact statements.

expectations.text: Provides artifact status in the response with the exact artifact path.
expectations.evidence: Artifact Status section gives exact absolute path(s) for created workflow artifact and copied outputs artifact.

expectations.text: Includes rationale or trade-offs for the proposed design.
expectations.evidence: Recommendation and artifact trade-off section compare centralized startup validation versus per-command validation and explain chosen direction.

expectations.text: The Validation Plan section of the handoff artifact contains TDD completion, a code-simplifier refactor pass, and independent code-reviewer review as named discrete steps — not buried solely in the Implementation Slices section.
expectations.evidence: Validation Plan explicitly names: TDD completion check, code-simplifier refactor pass, and independent code-reviewer review as separate numbered steps.
